epic.title: EVA Data Model
epic.description: Semantic object model for the entire EVA ecosystem. 11/11 layers complete, 0 validation violations. Machine-queryable equivalent of a repository — every service, persona, endpoint, screen, container, agent, and requirement is a typed node with FK-style cross-references. Assembled into eva-model.json.

features.title: Core Model Layers (1–6)
features.description: Services, Endpoints, Schemas, Containers, Personas, Feature Flags. Each layer validated against JSON Schema with zero dangling references.

features.title: Extended Model Layers (7–11)
features.description: Screens, Literals (bilingual), Agents, Requirements, Infrastructure. Fully cross-referenced to core layers.

features.title: Model Tooling — Validation & Assembly
features.description: validate-model.ps1 (0 violations gate), assemble-model.ps1 (merges layers into eva-model.json), impact-analysis.ps1. Model is authoritative — no re-reading source files when layer is complete.

features.title: Model API — HTTP Service (FastAPI, port 8010)
features.description: FastAPI service that exposes all 11 model layers over HTTP with structured audit columns (row_version, is_active, created_by/at, modified_by/at), dual-mode store (MemoryStore auto-seeds from disk / CosmosStore partition key /layer), dual-mode cache (MemoryCache / RedisCache), cross-layer impact analysis (GET /model/impact), rich endpoint filter (GET /model/endpoints/filter), and admin routes (seed, cache-flush, audit trail, in-process validation). 24/24 pytest + 21/21 smoke tests passing.

user_stories.title: [DM-WI-0] Layers 1–6 complete — services, endpoints, schemas, containers, personas, feature flags
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All 6 layers populated. validate-model.ps1 exits 0. Zero dangling references. assemble-model.ps1 produces valid eva-model.json.

user_stories.title: [DM-WI-1] Layers 7–11 complete — screens, literals, agents, requirements, infrastructure
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All 5 extended layers populated. All screen API call references resolve to endpoint IDs. All literal keys have default_en and default_fr. validate-model.ps1 exits 0.

user_stories.title: [DM-WI-2] Model tooling — validate-model.ps1, assemble-model.ps1, impact-analysis.ps1
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: validate-model.ps1 catches all dangling reference types. assemble-model.ps1 merges all 11 layer files into eva-model.json. impact-analysis.ps1 accepts -field and returns affected endpoints/screens.

evidence.notes: Tooling operational. Copilot instructions reference canonical query patterns.

user_stories.title: [DM-WI-4] Model API core — FastAPI port 8010, dual-mode store/cache, EVA audit columns
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: uvicorn api.server:app --port 8010 starts with 0 errors. GET /health returns store/cache mode. All 11 layers accessible as GET/PUT/DELETE /model/{layer}/{id}. Auto-seeds from disk JSON on MemoryStore startup. Every object carries: created_by, created_at, modified_by, modified_at, row_version (+1 per write), is_active (soft-delete). GET one returns 404 on soft-deleted objects.

evidence.notes: Completed 2026-02-21. 23 Python files under api/. 24/24 pytest passing. 21/21 smoke tests PASS. validate-model.ps1 PASS 0 violations.

user_stories.title: [DM-WI-5] Cross-layer impact analysis — GET /model/impact?container=X
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Returns endpoints that read/write the container, screens that call those endpoints, agents with overlapping input_endpoints, requirements satisfied_by those endpoints. Optional field param narrows by cosmos field name. Response includes per-category arrays and total count.

evidence.notes: Completed 2026-02-21. Tests T20–T24 all passing. Equivalent of impact-analysis.ps1 over HTTP.

user_stories.title: [DM-WI-6] Endpoint filter — GET /model/endpoints/filter?status=stub&cosmos_writes=jobs&auth=admin
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Filter by any combination of: status, cosmos_writes, cosmos_reads, auth, feature_flag, service. Returns only active endpoints matching all supplied predicates. Served from cache if available.

evidence.notes: Completed 2026-02-21. Tests T09 (filter by status), T10 (filter by cosmos_writes), T11 (filter by auth) all passing.

user_stories.title: [DM-WI-3] ADO-Data Model bidirectional tagging
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: ADO WI tags include entity: tags (e.g. entity:assistant). sprint-context.json maps active WIs to affected entities. On WI Done: last_updated_sprint and last_updated_wi stamped in entity definition.

evidence.notes: Planned Sprint-7. Depends on WI-7 (eva-brain) closed.
